title: Cricket’s House on Jaya
description: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Nico Robin, Nami. The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: The sound from this enormous golden bell,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The former glory of its ancient city.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Amazing, a giant bell made from gold!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Umm... What's so enormous about this?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Haha, this isn't the actual golden bell.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, there's no solid proof of that.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: A golden bell and a bird...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I don't know for sure, but...

summary: The crew’s chaotic hunt continues as the dangers of Jaya’s wildlife and the pressure of the coming current build.
